title: Add CoinWallet trait to nie-core abstracting payment ops
description: Define CoinWallet trait in nie-core/src/coin.rs: chain() -> Chain, generate_receive_address(session_id: Uuid) -> String, send_payment stub returning Err('not implemented'). Implement ZcashWallet wrapping nie-wallet WalletStore. Add to nie-core lib.rs.
close_reason: MoneroCoinWallet implementing CoinWallet trait added to nie-monero/src/lib.rs with 4 tests
